title: juncus acutus subsp. variegatus
intro: Juncus acutus subsp. variegatus, also known as the variegated or variegated spike rush, is a subspecies of the Juncus acutus plant, a type of rush that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It is a perennial plant that grows in wetlands and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Juncus acutus subsp. variegatus is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can also be combined with other herbs to create tonics and salves for skin and respiratory health.
